g5_voiceover.notes: RESOLVED via ARC NSAccessibility bridge. VoiceOver on M4 confirmed: window title + 4 labeled landmarks navigable (Workspace tree/Editor/ARC dock/Status rail). Two bugs fixed during bring-up: setAccessibilityElement must be false (container, not leaf) and child elements need real non-zero screen frames (VO culls zero-frame). a11y semantic tree is framework-free (arc_ui::a11y) → reusable if floem escape executes.
g5_voiceover.raw_data_path: operator VoiceOver confirmation 2026-06-12 (Workspace tree/Editor/ARC dock/Status rail announced)
g5_voiceover.remediation: No accesskit feature in published gpui=0.2.2 on crates.io. Options: (a) add NSAccessibility bridge on ShellChromeView, (b) vendor/patch gpui with AccessKit path, (c) upgrade gpui pin to a rev that exposes accesskit support. Required before FINAL.

g6_ime.notes: ShellChromeView does not implement gpui::InputHandler (NSTextInputClient 1:1). IME composition will appear in platform floating input window, not inline in the palette TypeBox. Commit/cancel paths functional at OS level but inline composition is absent. This is the standard behavior for any GPU-rendered view without InputHandler. Remediation: implement InputHandler on ShellChromeView (or the TypeBox element) per gpui docs.
g6_ime.remediation: Implement gpui::InputHandler on the text-input element. Standard gpui pattern; Zed editor does this.

g7_bidi.notes: bidi_sample_lines() are rendered in the gpui spike TakeScreenshot phase (confirmed: lines set in ShellPortView.on_key Action::TakeScreenshot arm). Screenshot not captured during spike run. Re-run spike and screenshot when mixed-script text visible (Arabic RTL + LTR Latin + combining marks from g7-golden/sample.txt). Path: reports/spike-gpui-bidi.png
